scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:bundlers
scripts.test:node: npm run test:node:cjs && npm run test:node:esm
scripts.test:bundlers: npm run test:vite && npm run test:webpack
scripts.test:vite: cd vite-app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test:webpack: cd webpack-app && npm install && npm run build
